creator: Razi Khan
source_text:
Jerk Chicken Fried Rice! Meal prep 5 servings for the week in under 20 minutes. High protein, lower in calories, and full of flavour.👇🏽
-
Jerk Chicken:
• 800g chicken thighs, cubed
• 1 tbsp oil (or sesame oil)
• 3 tbsp jerk seasoning (I use grace mild spice)
• 1 tsp paprika, salt, pepper
-
Fried Rice:
• 1 tbsp minced garlic
• 1 large red onion, chopped
• 1 red bell pepper, chopped
• 1 green bell pepper, chopped
• 1 & 1/2 cup diced pineapples
• 1/4 cup soy sauce (I use low sodium)
• 700g cooked rice (any kind)
-
Per Serving of 5: 450 calories, 36g protein, 49g carbs, 11g fat
-
-
#recipe #mealprep #jerkchicken #friedrice #homemade
